HOPE.SpendDialogText: Choose how to spend Hope before your next attack, ability check, or saving throw.
HOPE.SpendAddLabel: Spend Hope to add +1 per point
HOPE.SpendRerollLabel: Spend 3 Hope to reroll the next d20
HOPE.SpendNoHope: You do not have any Hope to spend.
HOPE.RerollUsedMessage: {name} uses 3 Hope to reroll the next d20.
HOPE.AutoAwardMessage: {name} gains 1 Hope for a miss or failed save.
HOPE.MaxReachedMessage: {name} already has 5 Hope. Hope is reset to 1d4.
HOPE.Settings.AutoTriggerAbilityChecks.N: Auto-trigger Hope prompt for ability checks
HOPE.Settings.AutoTriggerAbilityChecks.H: When enabled, players with Hope will be prompted to spend it before rolling ability checks.
HOPE.Settings.MaxHope.Name: Maximum Hope
HOPE.Settings.MaxHope.Hint: The maximum amount of Hope a character can have before overflow occurs.
